'''shosayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:icacinaceous|icacinaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:icacinaceous|icacinaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shosayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosayithi|shosayithi]] || [[word:shosayiji|shosayiji]] || [[word:shosayishi|shosayishi]] || [[word:shosayiki|shosayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosayuthuthu|shosayuthuthu]] || [[word:shosayujuju|shosayujuju]] || [[word:shosayushushu|shosayushushu]] || [[word:shosayukuku|shosayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosayuthu|shosayuthu]] || [[word:shosayuju|shosayuju]] || [[word:shosayushu|shosayushu]] || [[word:shosayuku|shosayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosayufthuf|shosayufthuf]] || [[word:shosayufjuf|shosayufjuf]] || [[word:shosayufshuf|shosayufshuf]] || [[word:shosayufkuf|shosayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosayethe|shosayethe]] || [[word:shosayeje|shosayeje]] || [[word:shosayeshe|shosayeshe]] || [[word:shosayeke|shosayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosayothotho|shosayothotho]] || [[word:shosayojojo|shosayojojo]] || [[word:shosayoshosho|shosayoshosho]] || [[word:shosayokoko|shosayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosayotho|shosayotho]] || [[word:shosayojo|shosayojo]] || [[word:shosayosho|shosayosho]] || [[word:shosayoko|shosayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosayofthof|shosayofthof]] || [[word:shosayofjof|shosayofjof]] || [[word:shosayofshof|shosayofshof]] || [[word:shosayofkof|shosayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosayïfthïf|shosayïfthïf]] || [[word:shosayïfjïf|shosayïfjïf]] || [[word:shosayïfshïf|shosayïfshïf]] || [[word:shosayïfkïf|shosayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosayïfthïfthïf|shosayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:shosayïfjïfjïf|shosayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:shosayïfshïfshïf|shosayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:shosayïfkïfkïf|shosayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosayïfthïf|shosayïfthïf]] || [[word:shosayïfjïf|shosayïfjïf]] || [[word:shosayïfshïf|shosayïfshïf]] || [[word:shosayïfkïf|shosayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosayïfthïf|shosayïfthïf]] || [[word:shosayïfjïf|shosayïfjïf]] || [[word:shosayïfshïf|shosayïfshïf]] || [[word:shosayïfkïf|shosayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosayæthæ|shosayæthæ]] || [[word:shosayæjæ|shosayæjæ]] || [[word:shosayæshæ|shosayæshæ]] || [[word:shosayækæ|shosayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosayathatha|shosayathatha]] || [[word:shosayajaja|shosayajaja]] || [[word:shosayashasha|shosayashasha]] || [[word:shosayakaka|shosayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosayatha|shosayatha]] || [[word:shosayaja|shosayaja]] || [[word:shosayasha|shosayasha]] || [[word:shosayaka|shosayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosayafthaf|shosayafthaf]] || [[word:shosayafjaf|shosayafjaf]] || [[word:shosayafshaf|shosayafshaf]] || [[word:shosayafkaf|shosayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shosayasha|shosayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shosayshësha|shosayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shosayrosha|shosayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shosaymusha|shosaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shosayasha|shosayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshosaynkshësha|goshosaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshosaynkrosha|goshosaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshosaynkmusha|goshosaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshosaynkyasha|goshosaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shosasayasha|shosasayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shosasayshësha|shosasayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shosasayrosha|shosasayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shosasaymusha|shosasaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shosasayasha|shosasayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshosasaynkshësha|goshosasaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshosasaynkrosha|goshosasaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshosasaynkmusha|goshosasaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshosasaynkyasha|goshosasaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shesæyasha|shesæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shesæyshësha|shesæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shesæyrosha|shesæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shesæymusha|shesæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shesæyasha|shesæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshesæynkshësha|goshesæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshesæynkrosha|goshesæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshesæynkmusha|goshesæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshesæynkyasha|goshesæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shosfayasha|shosfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shosfayshësha|shosfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shosfayrosha|shosfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shosfaymusha|shosfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shosfayasha|shosfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshosfaynkshësha|goshosfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshosfaynkrosha|goshosfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshosfaynkmusha|goshosfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshosfaynkyasha|goshosfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
